subcodes.title: Address to the friends at Rue St. Didier 30 in Paris, 1913-03-09
subcodes.first_line: O God! This [city of] Paris is a lamp in the utmost transparency but it is in need of the light. It is a body in the greatest of comeliness but it is in need of the spirit.
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @spiritual transformation, @Manifestation of God as divine physician
